name: Potato Nests
recipeIngredient: 2 medium potatoes, peeled and cut into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the potato cubes well, drain them, and pat dry.
2. Heat the peanut oil to 375°F (190°C).
3. Dip the nested basket set into the hot oil.
4. Arrange a single layer of potato cubes in the bottom basket.
5. Cover with the top basket.
6. Place the potato basket into the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
7. Carefully remove from the basket using tongs or a slotted spoon.
8. Drain on a cooling rack and blot with paper towels to remove excess oil.
9. Keep warm in an oven preheated to 300°F (150°C) until serving.
10. Fill as desired and serve warm or at room temperature.
